cards.detail: A cloud service model where compute, storage, and networking are rented instead of owned directly.
The maximum acceptable amount of data loss measured in time.

cards.back: Grant only the access required to perform a task.
cards.detail: A security principle that reduces blast radius when credentials or roles are misused.

texts.title: Shared Responsibility
texts.body: In cloud computing, security work is shared between the provider and the customer. The provider secures the underlying cloud infrastructure. The customer secures identities, data, configuration, and application behavior.
texts.translation: Use this text to practice explaining the boundary between provider-owned and customer-owned security responsibilities.
